race.comment: ANGEL STELLA BELLE (6) has not raced since showing pace before dropping out on debut over 1500m at Yarra Valley on 24 March. Gets a few gear changes for the first run in a new stable. Should give a good account in a moderate race. MR CORNSTAR (4) led for a home and looked a chance for a stride or two but was soon overwhelmed at the end of 900m at Newcastle recently. Should give backers a sight in this less daunting maiden. BUZZ SAW (3) is back after a seven-month spell. In the money at three of five runs to date, including two at today's distance. Jumps in a lot closer after the scratchings which helps. RIPS LAW (7) ran a better race at Moree last start and will be peaking after three runs back from a spell. First starter BE SOMEONE (1) trialled well here on his home track recently and looks all set for a positive start to his career.
